title: Vendor research summary
description: Search the analytics vendor landscape. Compare three options on pricing and integrations. Summarize findings into a 5-bullet recommendation.

title: Incident triage report
description: Fetch the latest API health KPIs. Then evaluate which endpoints exceeded the latency budget. Summarize the top three incidents and propose owners.

title: Quarterly business KPI digest
description: Pull the KPI snapshot. Compute the QoQ deltas. Summarize the top movers and flag anything that needs human approval.

title: Flaky integration retry demo
description: Run the flaky integration probe. If it times out, fall back to a simple echo and record the retry trace.

title: Sensitive export with approval gate
description: Export the sensitive customer extract. This step requires explicit human approval before the worker may execute.
